channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Is SaaS dead? Not quite, but it’s evolving rapidly
item.description: While technology trends come and go, the SaaS industry has been a core buyer priority and industry growth engine for 25+ years.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: OpenAI rolls out upgrade to reasoning model, new dev tools
item.description: The release Tuesday by OpenAI of OpenA1 o1, its reasoning model, in API, along with three new sets of tools for developers, is a “smart move that keeps [it] in the corporate/enterprise conversation, as so many customers are shifting their focus towards agentic applications over simpler chat-based ap
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot
item.description: In today's Federal Newscast, Homeland Security has rolled out its own generative AI chatbot, now available to roughly 19,000 employees. The post Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Transformando la distribución: cómo Ingram Micro se está convirtiendo en una empresa de plataforma
item.description: Sanjib Sahoo, vicepresidente ejecutivo de Tecnología Global y director de Desarrollo de la empresa distribuidora de tecnología Ingram Micro, atribuye el mérito a la enorme transformación de la empresa a un modelo basado en el valor, un cambio de mentalidad que prioriza los resultados sobre la activi
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: IT/OT convergence propels zero-trust security efforts
item.description: Zero-trust security is essential to enterprises that are converging operational technology (OT) with IT infrastructure. New research from Enterprise Management Associates (EMA) identified how this convergence influences zero-trust strategy and implementation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S25 launch poster has just leaked, along with photos of the S25 Plus
item.description: A leaked poster points to a January 22 launch date, and we've also seen leaked Samsung Galaxy S25 Plus photos and leaked color names.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Transforming distribution: How Ingram Micro is becoming a platform business
item.description: How and why is Ingram Micro becoming a platform business? Our history is rooted in a traditional distribution model of marketing, selling, and shipping vendor products to our resellers.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Kazakhstan’s Carpet CCTV: Pioneering the future of AI-powered public safety
item.description: In a world where technology increasingly shapes how cities manage safety and security, Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way with its groundbreaking “Carpet CCTV” project.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Blood in the iPhones? Apple faces criminal charges
item.description: Apple has been accused of knowingly financing a trade characterized by atrocities in criminal litigation launched by the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). It relates to use of so-called “blood minerals” in its devices.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Schneider Electric shares energy-efficient data center designs
item.description: Schneider Electric has introduced AI-ready data center designs aimed at addressing the energy demands and sustainability challenges brought by artificial intelligence (AI). The new solutions are designed to enhance efficiency, sustainability and scalability for AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Google’s Agentspace will put AI agents in the hands of workers
item.description: Google has unveiled a new tool to access AI agents that can automate workflows and help workers find information held across their organization. AI agents have become a major focus for software vendors in recent months, including Atlassian, Microsoft, Salesforce, and numerous others.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Elon Musk wants to turn SpaceX's Starbase site into a Texas city
item.description: Billionaire Elon Musk 's company on Thursday sent a letter to local officials requesting an election to turn what it calls Starbase — the South Texas site where SpaceX builds and launches its massive Starship rockets — into an incorporated city.
item.dc:creator: VALERIE GONZALEZ, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 12 easy, techy ways to make the holiday smoother
item.description: To make the busiest time of year more manageable, here are some tricks for tracking your packages, taking quality family photos and curating the perfect Christmas playlist.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
